title: MoonPay Acquires AI Accounting Agent Maker Entendre
message_html: MoonPay Acquires AI Accounting Agent Maker Entendre ...
snippet: Crypto payments company MoonPay has acquired Entendre, which makes artificial intelligence (AI) accounting agents for stablecoin firms. The purchase “extends MoonPay’s infrastructure into the financial operations layer,” the company said in a Monday (June 22) news release, adding artificial intellig
